title: Kadham Sustainability Platform
description: Built full-stack blockchain platform rewarding users with ERC-20 (GBC) tokens for waste disposal.
Constructed 4 core components: JWT authentication, MetaMask integration, Mistral AI-powered waste classification.
Deployed 2 Solidity smart contracts with role-based access control.

title: Rubik's Cube Visualizer
description: Designed 3D interactive Rubik's Cube with scrambling and solving features.
Used CSS 3D transforms and JavaScript for smooth rotations and animations across 54 cube facets.

title: Ransomware Early Warning System
description: Developed behavior-based detection for Android monitoring file encryption and rapid operations.
Crafted FileObserver monitoring and process scanning with 5+ permission checks.
Automated foreground service for threat logging with low resource usage.

title: Movie Streaming Platform
description: Coded full-stack movie streaming app with JWT auth and watch progress tracking.
Used bcrypt hashing and MongoDB for data storage of 100+ movies.
Implemented captcha signup and resume functionality.

title: Android Malware Detector
description: Built a Kotlin-based application to scan installed apps for known malware signatures.
Integrated a cloud-based threat intelligence API for real-time updates.
Implemented background scanning and user notification system.

title: Decentralized Voting System
description: Created a secure voting platform using Ethereum smart contracts to prevent tampering.
Implemented zero-knowledge proofs for voter anonymity.
Designed a React-based dashboard for real-time result tracking.
